description: Structured list of every remote API / network call the project makes, for hackathon transparency.

remote_calls.name: QVAC model asset download
remote_calls.purpose: One-time download of the Llama-3.2-1B-Instruct-Q4_0 model weights used for on-device inference.
remote_calls.trigger: First model download; not called again once cached.
remote_calls.data_sent: Model asset identifier only. No user data, prompts, or field notes are transmitted.

notes: No cloud LLM APIs are used for inference (no OpenAI, Anthropic, Gemini, OpenRouter, or any hosted model endpoint).
No backend proxy is used for inference.
After the one-time model download, inference runs fully on-device; verified in airplane mode.
